# PC-001 evidence — universal artifact router

Date: 2026-07-18

## Architecture delivered

- `artifactRouting.ts` is the pure product-type, portable-filename, matching/default-output, and
  platform-aware path resolver.
- `ArtifactRouterContext` selects the explicit session/workspace ID or active workspace, confirms
  missing-directory creation, owns the single renderer save call, and keeps native downloads pinned
  to the visible session.
- Electron validates per-window output configs against canonical approved roots, publishes only
  the latest validation revision, owns the save dialog and complete file/content write, and routes
  `will-download` with collision reservations.
- Workspace metadata export, session export, artifact tabs, embedded tool results, and Outputs Save
  Copy all use the router. The generic renderer save-dialog IPC was removed.
- App updates, automatic session archives, and app configuration retain their dedicated contracts.

## Audit and repair

The `audit-workflow-gui`, `audit-dataflow-input-output`, and `audit-dataflow-concurrency`
inventories closed every WFG-001–015, IOP-001–015, and CON-001–018 item. Six findings were
repaired:

1. strict base64 validation prevents partial/corrupt success;
2. in-flight path reservations prevent simultaneous download collisions;
3. unroutable downloads emit an actionable renderer warning;
4. in-memory content is capped at 256 MiB while file copies remain complete/native.
5. revision-checked config publication prevents stale async validation from restoring an old route.
6. UTF-8 byte-bounded filenames remain portable for emoji/CJK-heavy generated titles.

See `audits/pc-001-artifact-router-audit.md` and its canonical findings JSON.

| ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `source bin/activate-hermit && (cd ui/desktop && pnpm run typecheck)`     | pass                                               |

| changed-file Desktop Prettier check                                       | pass                                               |
| `pnpm run i18n:extract && pnpm run i18n:check`                            | pass: 15 catalogs, 21 sync/recovery tests          |
| `source bin/activate-hermit && cargo fmt --check`                         | pass                                               |

| `git diff --check`                                                        | pass                                               |
| save/download negative-space search                                       | pass: no user-artifact anchor/direct-dialog bypass |

## Known unrelated baseline

- Repository-wide `pnpm run lint:check` still fails in pre-existing files: undefined DOM globals in
  `createWebSocketStream.test.ts` and `scroll-area.test.tsx`, plus existing hook-dependency warnings
  in `Hub.tsx` and `useNavigationSessions.ts`. Every file changed by PC-001 passes ESLint.
- Repository-wide `pnpm run format:check` reports 57 pre-existing unformatted Desktop files. Every
  file changed by PC-001 passes Prettier.

## Acceptance decision

REQ-025 is verified. The router preserves session pinning, never silently substitutes a deleted
workspace, never creates a missing output without confirmation, never moves an existing artifact,
and reports real write/routing outcomes. The only scope limit is an independent third-party tool
writing directly to an explicit path outside Gosling's Desktop artifact UI.
